description: Stat definitions — controls how stats are stored, transmitted, saved, displayed on items, and how they interact via operators for derived bonuses.

send other.description: Whether this stat is sent to other players in multiplayer (used for stats affecting visuals like faster cast rate)

send bits.description: Number of bits used to transmit this stat between client and server during gameplay

send param bits.description: Number of bits used to transmit the stat parameter (e.g., skill ID for per-skill stats) between client and server

updateanimrate.description: Whether changing this stat triggers a recalculation of animation speeds (used by IAS, FCR, FHR, FBR)

saved.description: Whether this stat is saved to the character/item save file. Unsaved stats are recalculated at load

csvparam.description: Number of bits allocated for the stat parameter in the character save file

minaccr.description: Minimum accumulation value — the minimum the stat can be reduced to by negative modifiers

encode.description: Encoding type for compound stats: 0=normal, 1=encode as (value * param), 2=encode with skill/level/charge, 3=encode with skill/level/chance

1.09-save bits.description: Number of bits allocated for this stat in v1.09 save files (legacy compatibility)

1.09-save add.description: Offset added to saved value in v1.09 save files to allow negative values (legacy compatibility)

save bits.description: Number of bits allocated for this stat value in item save data. Maximum stat value = 2^SaveBits - 1

save add.description: Offset added when saving to allow negative stat ranges. Effective range: -SaveAdd to 2^SaveBits - 1 - SaveAdd

save param bits.description: Number of bits allocated for the stat parameter in item save data (e.g., skill index for per-skill bonuses)

keepzero.description: Whether to keep this stat on the item even when its value is zero (prevents pruning of zero-value stats)

op param.description: Parameter for the operator formula — typically a bit shift divisor, so the formula is statvalue * opbase / 2^opparam

op stat1.description: First stat that receives the operator bonus calculated from this stat and op base

op stat2.description: Second stat that receives the operator bonus (optional)

op stat3.description: Third stat that receives the operator bonus (optional)

direct.description: Whether this stat is applied directly to the character rather than being stored on the item

maxstat.description: Associated maximum stat (e.g., maxhp for hitpoints, maxmana for mana) — used for stats that have current/max pairs

itemspecific.description: Whether this stat is stored per-item rather than aggregated on the character (e.g., item durability)

damagerelated.description: Whether this stat is damage-related and should be recalculated when weapon setup changes

itemevent1.description: First item event trigger (e.g., 'kill', 'hit', 'gethit') that activates this stat's callback

itemeventfunc1.description: Function ID executed when itemevent1 triggers

itemevent2.description: Second item event trigger that activates this stat's callback

itemeventfunc2.description: Function ID executed when itemevent2 triggers

descpriority.description: Display priority on item tooltips — higher values are shown earlier/higher on the item description

descfunc.description: Function ID controlling how this stat is formatted in item descriptions (e.g., 1=+value, 2=value%, 3=value, 4=+value%, etc.)

descval.description: Where the numeric value appears in the description: 0=hidden, 1=before the string, 2=after the string

descstrpos.description: TBL string key used when the stat value is positive (e.g., 'strModEnhancedDamage')

descstrneg.description: TBL string key used when the stat value is negative

descstr2.description: Secondary TBL string key appended after the main description (e.g., used for 'to Mana after each Kill')

dgrpfunc.description: Function ID used to format the grouped description when all stats in the dgrp have equal values

dgrpval.description: Where the numeric value appears in the grouped description: 0=hidden, 1=before string, 2=after string

dgrpstrpos.description: TBL string key for the grouped description when the combined value is positive

dgrpstrneg.description: TBL string key for the grouped description when the combined value is negative

dgrpstr2.description: Secondary TBL string key appended after the grouped description

csvbits.description: Number of bits used in CSV storage
